name: Galaxy Champions TV
short_description: Galaxy Champions TV is a super intense top-down closed arena shooter game inspired by the classic arcade game Smash TV. Get powerful weapons and power-ups, kill huge amounts of enemies, level up, unlock upgrades and beat all the bosses to become the champion of the most violent TV show of all time!
detailed_description:
Galaxy Champions TV is a super intense top-down closed arena shooter game inspired by the classic arcade game Smash TV. Get powerful weapons and power-ups, kill huge amounts of enemies, level up, unlock upgrades and beat all the bosses to become the champion of the most violent TV show of all time! Are you ready to become the Champ?!

"Good luck! You'll need it!"

Features:

  • Fast paced run and gun gameplay. Be fast or die!
  • Arcade score chaser style game!
  • 60+ upgrades.
  • 20+ powerful weapons (5 powerful upgradable weapons).
  • 4 different planets.
  • 15+ varieties of enemies.
  • 4 insane boss fights.
  • Champions mode. How long can you survive?
  • 2 players local co-op mode. Don't fight alone! Win this show with your friends!
  • Global leaderboard.
